nodes.title: Foundation-1
widgets_values:
# Foundation-1
## Auto-Download
**Model auto-downloads on first run** - no manual setup needed!
| Model | VRAM | Size |
|-------|------|------|
| Foundation-1 (fp16) | ~7GB | ~5GB |
---
## Manual Download
| File | Size | Link |
|------|------|------|
| Foundation_1.safetensors | ~5GB | [Download](https://huggingface.co/RoyalCities/Foundation-1) |
| model_config.json | ~2KB | [Download](https://huggingface.co/RoyalCities/Foundation-1) |
---
Place in:
ComfyUI/models/stable_audio/Foundation-1/
├── Foundation_1.safetensors
└── model_config.json
---
## Requirements
- **GPU:** 8GB VRAM minimum
- **Speed:** ~20 it/s with default sampler
- **Attention:** Flash Attention 2 (minimum) / SageAttention 2.2.0+ (recommended)
---
## Samplers
| Sampler | Quality | Speed | Notes |
|---------|---------|-------|-------|
| dpmpp-3m-sde | Best | ~20 it/s | Recommended |
| dpmpp-2m-sde | Good | ~22 it/s | Slightly faster |
| k-dpm-fast | Good | Faster | Fewer steps needed |
---
## Musical Keys (24 supported)
**Major:** C, C#, D, Eb, E, F, F#, G, Ab, A, Bb, B
**Minor:** Cm, C#m, Dm, D#m, Em, Fm, F#m, Gm, G#m, Am, Bbm, Bm
---
## Tag Categories
| Category | Examples |
|----------|----------|
| **Instrument** | Synth Lead, Piano, Guitar, Drums, Bass, Strings |
| **Timbre** | Warm, Bright, Dark, Rich, Clean, Soft |
| **FX** | Reverb, Delay, Distortion, Chorus, Spacey |
| **Notation** | Arp, Chord, Melody, Bassline, Rolling |
| **Character** | Intimate, Wide, Thick, Punchy, Tight |
---
## Links
- Inference Engine [stable-audio-tools](https://github.com/Stability-AI/stable-audio-tools)
- Model [Foundation-1](https://huggingface.co/RoyalCities/Foundation-1)
- Issues [Report Bug](https://github.com/saganaki22/ComfyUI-Foundation-1/issues)
-
